frame_data.model_route: matrix Fisher on Stiefel frames; polar part estimates orientation

hyperboloid_data.model_route: density uses Minkowski product p * x, not Euclidean dot product

rotation_data.model_route: matrix Fisher style score tr(F.T @ R)

subspace_data.model_route: matrix Bingham style score tr(A @ P)
